figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the attack mechanism.

Figure 6: Semantic failures of IR-VLMs in captioning, VQA, and physical deployment under the proposed patch. (A) Captioning errors. (B) VQA errors. (C) Physical examples with GPT-5-based scoring. Correct semantics are highlighted in green and semantic errors in red.
Figure 7: Overview of the physical attack. (a) Deployment examples at different distances and viewpoints. (b) ASR results of the physical attack deployment.
Figure 3: CGM parameterization examples. (a) Mesh topology under different deformation parameters. (b) Physical validation of smooth and self-intersecting structures.
Figure 8: Transfer results over ASR, Δ𝑠target, and 𝑀adv. (a) Cross-dataset transfer. (b) Cross-model transfer. D1–D5 denote Infrared-COCO, LSOTB-TIR, LLVIP, M3FD, and FLIR, respectively.
Figure 9: Ablation results on key hyperparameters. (a) Population size. (b) Patch color. (c) Graph-KL weight 𝜆topo. (d) Grid-line width.
